name: Nutritious Granola Mix
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup sesame seeds, dried and hulled
3/4 cup safflower oil or Canola oil
recipeInstructions:
Rye flakes and wheat flakes can be found at health food stores and some supermarkets.
Use a variety of dried fruits for interesting taste: raisins, dates, apricots, apples, peaches, etc.
Combine oats, rye, wheat, wheat germ, coconut, sunflower seeds, nuts and sesame seeds in a large bowl. Stir until blended well.
In a saucepan, combine brown sugar, water, oil, honey, molasses, salt, vanilla and cinnamon. Heat and stir until sugar is dissolved. Do not boil.
Pour syrup over oat mixture. Stir with a wooden spoon until syrup coats all ingredients.
Spread mixture in two 13 x 9 x 2-inch pans or on 2 large cookie sheets with raised edges. Bake in preheated 300-degree oven for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally. For crunchier texture, bake 7-10 minutes longer. Cool on racks.
Stir in the chopped dried fruit pieces.
You can put this into containers and keep in a cool dry place for up to 6 months. Do not refrigerate.
